title: Readable letters
description: be able to read what the weird text in the enchanting table says!
body:
**Readable letters**

so this resource pack replaces the galactic letters with the letters we have today.
The resource pack doesnt really have a purpose, i guess its cool?
(remember! the text is not the same as the enchantment, so be aware) 

heres a list of what the resource pack adds:
- text

have fun! (or not, its your own choice)
